title: Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences Vision & Mission
content:
Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences Vision & Mission

The Vision

Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences will be a leading and exemplary force in new era of health informatics where quantitative methods of engineering play a pivotal role in biotechnology, genetics, brain mapping and behavioral studies, disease prevention, diagnosis, treatment, rehabilitation, and health care delivery in collaboration with NPISTANBUL Neuropsychiatry Hospital within the context of meeting important societal needs.

The Mission

Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences provides its graduates with top quality education in engineering, preparing them to practice their professions competently to meet the ever-changing needs of society, and to continue learning their discipline, allowing them to move into other related fields including medicine, pharmaceutical science and neuropsychiatry.  Innovation, excellence and diversity in research are essential to our mission and build on our strong collaboration with research laboratories and NPISTANBUL Neuropsychiatry Hospital with its valuable experience. The Faculty encourages a spirit of entrepreneurship amongst its students and staff throughout their lives. The Faculty strives to provide a learning environment that promotes innovation, evolution, ethical practice and responsibility towards society. The Faculty is also committed to a culture built on respect of the individual’s abilities to discover their diversity, creativity and to create opportunities to benefit from engineering and applied technologies.
